sentences.arabic: يَجْلِسُ خَالِدٌ أَمَامَ حَاسُوبِهِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Halid sjedi ispred svog računara osam sati.
sentences.translationEn: Khaled sits in front of his computer for eight hours.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَبُ الْقَهْوَةَ مَعَ زُمَلَائِهِ خِلَالَ فَتْرَةِ الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pije kafu sa svojim kolegama tokom pauze.
sentences.translationEn: He drinks coffee with his colleagues during the break period.

sentences.arabic: يُرْسِلُ الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الرَّسَائِلِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ إِلَى الزَّبَائِنِ.
sentences.translationEn: He sends many emails to the customers.
